description_long: This is an ornate, classical-style sculpture featuring two standing human figures, one male and one female, both draped in flowing garments. The figures are positioned closely together atop a decorative, multi-tiered pedestal with elaborate scrollwork and relief details. The male figure appears to be holding a cluster of flowers or foliage, while the female figure is partially seated and gazes upward. At the base, a smaller child-like figure is present, adding to the narrative complexity of the piece. The sculpture is predominantly white with subtle weathering and patina, suggesting it is made of marble or a similar stone. The overall composition is dynamic, with intricate folds in the clothing and expressive postures that evoke a sense of movement and interaction.
description: A detailed white marble sculpture of two draped human figures with a child at the base, set on an ornate pedestal. The piece features intricate folds, expressive poses, and classical decorative elements.
description_view_0: The front view shows both main figures in full detail, with the male holding foliage and the female partially seated, as well as the child figure at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the flowing garments and the interaction between the figures, with the child figure more visible at the base.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the backs of the two main figures and the detailed drapery, with less visibility of facial features and the child figure.
description_view_3: This angled view provides a clear look at the child figure and the side profiles of the main figures, emphasizing the sculpture's depth and layered composition.
attribute_subject_matter: classical human figures with a child, possibly mythological or allegorical
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible, but the sculpture appears suitable for outdoor urban plazas, parks, or gardens.
